name: 06_Sentiment_Analysis_SVM_Sentiment140_ML
query: Tafadhali nisaidie kujenga mfumo wa uchambuzi wa hisia kwenye tweets ukitumia seti ya data ya Sentiment140 inayopatikana kutoka Hugging Face. Pakia seti ya data ya Sentiment140 na, wakati wa kupakia data, isafishe kwa kuondoa maneno ya kusimama, alama za uandishi, na herufi maalum, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia Word2Vec au GloVe kwa uvektaishaji wa maandishi. Hii inapaswa kufanyika katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tekeleza na funza kisanidi cha SVM katika `src/model.py`. Mwishowe, andika ripoti ya usahihi wa kisanidi kwenye `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`. Kwa kawaida, ripoti inapaswa kuwa rahisi kufasiri.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Sentiment140," inayopatikana kutoka "Hugging Face," inapatikana katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Seti ya data inasafishwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa maneno ya kusimama, alama za uandishi, na herufi maalum, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uwekaji wa maneno, ama "Word2Vec" au "GloVe," unatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa vekta katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kisanidi cha "SVM" kinatekelezwa na kufunzwa katika `src/model.py`.
Alama ya usahihi inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa kupakua seti ya data unapaswa kuwa wa kuaminika, na uwe na utunzaji wa makosa wazi.
Ripoti ya mwisho ya usahihi inapaswa kuwa rahisi na rahisi kufasiri.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Sentiment140," inayopatikana kutoka "Hugging Face," inapatikana katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually implement loading of the Sentiment140 dataset from Hugging Face. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. There is no actual code that uses the Hugging Face `datasets` library (e.g., `from datasets import load_dataset` and `load_dataset("sentiment140")`). The file merely lists the requirement criteria as strings in a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list, which is not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data inasafishwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa maneno ya kusimama, alama za uandishi, na herufi maalum, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a string `"loaded"` and some notes, while `build_transforms()` returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no actual implementation of data cleaning — no removal of stop words, no removal of punctuation, and no removal of special characters. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and does not contain any real data processing logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Uwekaji wa maneno, ama "Word2Vec" au "GloVe," unatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa vekta katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of Word2Vec or GloVe embeddings. It only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a dictionary with a string `"loaded"` and some requirement notes. The keywords "Word2Vec" and "GloVe" appear only in a list called `KEYWORDS` and `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` as string literals for documentation purposes, not as functional code that converts text to vectors. There is no import of any embedding library (e.g., `gensim`, `torchtext`, `transformers`), no model loading, and no actual text-to-vector transformation logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Kisanidi cha "SVM" kinatekelezwa na kufunzwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain any actual SVM implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub code with keywords list (`KEYWORDS = ["SVM classifier", "svm"]`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no import of any SVM library (e.g., `sklearn.svm.SVC`), no actual SVM classifier instantiation, no training logic, and no fitting of a model on data. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no SVM implementation or training steps were recorded.

judge_stats.criteria: Alama ya usahihi inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt` exists, but its content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)` — this is clearly a placeholder value, not an actual computed accuracy score from a trained SVM model on the Sentiment140 dataset. A valid accuracy score should be a numerical value (e.g., `0.8523`), not a tuple containing the string "placeholder". The requirement to print and save a real accuracy score has not been fulfilled.
